patch.value: 2026-05-09 latest-build full pm CLI dogfood audit and remediation

Execute the latest-build full pm CLI audit in an isolated temporary project, review SDK/extensibility/calendar/search/agent UX/CI/telemetry/Sentry/security hygiene, remediate safe findings, and verify before push.

Temp-project dogfood covers core workflows; semantic/vector search and calendar are exercised; SDK/extensibility/agent-output/CI/security/telemetry/Sentry are reviewed; safe fixes are linked and tested; no private host credentials or tokens are tracked or recorded; changes are committed and pushed with checks reviewed.

message: Reopen audit item for Windows CI follow-up

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: CI follow-up: Windows Node 20 failed tests/unit/reindex-command.spec.ts because the truncation regression passed a 50k body through a CLI argument. Reduced the fixture body to 1k characters, which still exceeds the semantic 200-character truncation cap and avoids Windows command-line limits. Verification: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/reindex-command.spec.ts passed 10/10; node scripts/check-secrets.mjs passed; git diff --check passed.

patch.value: Temp-project dogfood, semantic smoke, telemetry/Sentry review, full coverage, typecheck, build, static quality, package smoke, compatibility, validation, health, and secret scans passed; Windows CI follow-up fixed the reindex truncation regression fixture to avoid OS command-line limits while preserving coverage of the 200-character semantic truncation cap; full forced repo hybrid reindex was stopped after local Ollama remained CPU-bound, with health reporting zero stale vectors.
Audit completed with semantic search reliability fixes, agent-friendly JSON ok fields, regression coverage, Windows CI fixture hardening, and tracked secret hygiene verification.
